title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech hosted a livestream on coding with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to solve a text adventure game. Speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrated practical applications of the ADK framework.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream walks through using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to build an AI agent that plays and solves a text adventure game. Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar present a hands-on coding session, demonstrating how the framework handles agent orchestration in a concrete task. The exercise grounds abstract concepts about AI agents in a working example rather than a high-level overview.
